meta.title: BirLiy Template Library (Deliverable 7)
meta.purpose: Reusable, fact-grounded content structures for the BirLiy CMO. Each template tells the writer exactly which inputs to gather, which APPROVED_FACTS ids must back the copy, how to structure RU and UZ output, which CTA to use, and which conditions fail QA. Templates are blueprints, not pre-written posts; they enforce the hard rules so any generated piece stays truthful and on-brand.
relies_on: growth-os/knowledge/APPROVED_FACTS.json (the only source of factual claims; cite ids)
growth-os/knowledge/COMPANY_CONTEXT.md (what the CMO may, must qualify, must never claim)
marketing/01-strategy.md and marketing/02-content-system.md (positioning, 7 pillars, post templates A-D)
meta.tone: calm experienced shopkeeper-neighbour. Brand principle: 'Меньше частей. Больше ясности.' Short sentences, real verbs, money and time of the owner, not features for their own sake. Max 1-2 emoji per piece.
hard_rules: Use only facts from APPROVED_FACTS.json and cite their ids in required_factual_evidence; never invent numbers, customer counts, percentages, testimonials, integrations, deadlines, install times, team actions, or completion states.
Qualify every needs_confirmation fact as a stated / pilot / early-access claim, never as a guarantee.

Never present a prohibited fact as real: demo dashboard numbers (3 450 000, 87 000, 42, +12%, 18, 3 cashiers, 2 returns), the sample receipt (Milk/Bread/Coffee, 20 500), or 'real shops already working'.
Never name a bank, Ipak Yuli, or any parent company. Never expand 'Сделано для Узбекистана' / 'O'zbekiston uchun yaratilgan' to name one.
No em-dash character in any generated public copy, hook, CTA, post, outline, or example. Use ':' ',' or '-'.
RU and UZ must carry equivalent meaning and read native, not literal. No hype words (революция, инновация, лучший, №1, трансформация, синергия). No fake scarcity.
Two approved CTAs only: 'Оставить заявку' (birliy.uz #lead) and 'Написать в Telegram' (+998 97 421 24 54). No CTA means not publishable.
Currency stays сум / so'm; quote the price wording from fact_pricing_promo / fact_pricing_start_chip only, and frame it as the first-cohort / early-access rate.

fact_status_reminder.needs_confirmation: Reusable wording, but frame as a stated / pilot / typical claim, never a guarantee; offer to confirm specifics via @birliy_support_bot.
fact_status_reminder.prohibited: Never present as real. Used here only on a do-not-use list inside failure_conditions.

leave_request.use_when: Offer, launch, product-announcement, and any piece pushing to the site form (especially Instagram where the link sits in the profile bio).

write_telegram.use_when: Lowest-friction action; the default for Telegram posts, pain posts, objection handling, owner stories. Cite the channel @bir_liy and support @birliy_support_bot when relevant.

global_qa_rules: Scan the final text for the em-dash character; if present, replace with ':' ',' or '-'.
Scan for 'UZS'; currency must be 'сум' (RU) or 'so'm' (UZ).
Scan for any bank / Ipak Yuli / parent-company name; must be absent.
Every factual claim maps to an APPROVED_FACTS id; needs_confirmation facts are qualified; no prohibited fact is presented as real.
RU and UZ versions carry equivalent meaning, read native, and use the canonical terms from COMPANY_CONTEXT terminology dictionary.
No banned hype word, no fake scarcity, max 1-2 emoji.
Exactly one approved CTA is present and routed to the correct destination.
Holds the brand promise: one mind, one thought, one CTA; 'Меньше частей. Больше ясности.'
global_failure_conditions: Any em-dash character in public copy.
'UZS' anywhere; or a currency figure without 'сум' / 'so'm'.
Any bank / Ipak Yuli / parent-company name, or an expanded 'made for Uzbekistan' line that names one.
Any invented number, customer count, percentage, testimonial, integration, deadline, install time, or completion state.
A prohibited demo number, the sample receipt, or 'real shops already working' presented as a real result.
A needs_confirmation fact stated as a guarantee instead of a stated / pilot claim.
No CTA, or a CTA other than the two approved ones, or a wrong destination.
RU and UZ diverge in meaning, or the UZ reads like a literal machine translation.

telegram_post.label: Telegram post (core conversion channel)
telegram_post.use_when: The main channel for requests. A short, readable post built on ONE of the 7 content pillars, ending in a Telegram CTA. Audience reads the whole text, so it is warmer and more direct than Instagram.
telegram_post.maps_to_strategy: marketing/01-strategy.md sections 6-8; marketing/02-content-system.md templates A/B/C/D and the 7 pillars.
required_inputs: content_pillar: one of [pain_to_relief, how_it_works, owner_freedom, one_feature_big, trust, by_segment, offer]
single_idea: the one thought this post carries (one pillar, one idea, one CTA)
language_mode: ru | uz | ru_then_uz (offer and launch posts ship bilingual)
optional_inputs: target_segment: from ICP_AND_PAIN_MAP (neighbourhood/minimarket primary; grocery, pharmacy, service, cafe secondary)
product_screenshot_ref: real screenshot from .research/product-walk/ (preferred over mockups)
season_or_hook: a calm, true hook (no fake scarcity)
required_factual_evidence: At least one APPROVED_FACTS id whose status is verified backs the core claim.
If the post is an offer post, fact_pricing_promo or fact_pricing_start_chip plus fact_promo_six_month, framed as the first-cohort rate.
If it touches onboarding (fact_onboarding_one_day, fact_onboarding_cashier_30min, fact_install_time) or QR settlement timing (fact_qr_no_terminal), qualify per needs_confirmation.
telegram_post.language_output: RU primary. UZ is a native mirror (not literal) for launch and offer posts, or on request. Use canonical RU/UZ terms (касса/kassa, склад/ombor, насия/nasiya, остатки/qoldiq).
structure: Hook line: a recognizable situation or the one idea, calm and concrete.
Body: 2-4 short lines in real verbs explaining the relief in terms of the owner's money and time.
Proof line: one verified capability tied to a fact id (qualify if needs_confirmation).
CTA line: one approved CTA.
telegram_post.cta_rules: Default 'Написать в Telegram' (+998 97 421 24 54). Use 'Оставить заявку' (birliy.uz #lead) for offer posts. Exactly one CTA.
qa_rules: Inherit meta.global_qa_rules.
One pillar, one idea, one CTA; do not stack features.
If a real product screenshot is used, place it on the warm paper background, not raw from a phone.
failure_conditions: Inherit meta.global_failure_conditions.
More than one idea or more than one CTA.
An offer post that omits the first-cohort framing or quotes a price not from the pricing facts.

seo_blog_article.label: SEO blog article (RU/UZ, ICP-pain led)
seo_blog_article.use_when: A long-form article targeting an ICP pain or a money keyword (notebook bookkeeping, nasiya vs qarz daftari, stock in a small shop, kassa without a register, choosing a POS). Builds organic and AI-discovery reach, then routes to a request.
seo_blog_article.maps_to_strategy: marketing/05-blog-ai-discovery.md, 08-behavioral-seo-keywords.md, 11-blog-keyword-map.md, 12-money-keywords-onpage-spec.md; mirrors the existing 14 blog posts.
required_inputs: primary_keyword: RU and UZ form of the target query
search_intent: the question the reader is actually asking
icp_pain: the pain from ICP_AND_PAIN_MAP this article resolves
language: ru | uz (publish both as native mirrors where the keyword map calls for it)
optional_inputs: secondary_keywords: supporting queries
internal_links: other blog posts or the landing #lead
faq_questions: 2-4 real reader questions for an FAQ block / AEO
required_factual_evidence: Every product capability named in the body cites a verified APPROVED_FACTS id.
Comparisons to notebook / Excel / 1C use fact_competitive_vs_notebook_1c only, stated factually.
Pricing, onboarding times, QR settlement, 9 000+ SKU, multi-point, loyalty, turnover are qualified per their needs_confirmation status.
seo_blog_article.language_output: Native RU or UZ matching the keyword; if both, they are equivalent, not literal translations. Currency сум / so'm.
structure: H1 with the primary keyword phrased as the reader would say it.
Intro: name the pain in the reader's words, promise a plain answer.
Body H2/H3: the answer, with verified BirLiy capabilities woven in where they genuinely solve the pain (each tied to a fact id).
Factual comparison block (optional): notebook / Excel / 1C vs BirLiy per fact_competitive_vs_notebook_1c, no defamation.
FAQ block: 2-4 short Q&A for AEO, answers grounded in facts.
Closing CTA section: one approved CTA.
seo_blog_article.cta_rules: End with 'Оставить заявку' (birliy.uz #lead) for product-intent articles, or 'Написать в Telegram' (+998 97 421 24 54) for softer educational ones. Exactly one primary CTA.
qa_rules: Inherit meta.global_qa_rules.
Keyword used naturally, no stuffing; headings answer the intent.
No claim that is not in APPROVED_FACTS; needs_confirmation framed as stated/pilot.
failure_conditions: Inherit meta.global_failure_conditions.
Any feature described as shipped that is needs_confirmation (loyalty, turnover, week/month reports, multi-point, day-register real-time, both app stores) without qualification.
A competitor named or disparaged beyond the factual notebook/Excel/1C comparison.

product_announcement.label: Product announcement (capability or milestone)
product_announcement.use_when: Announce something that is genuinely true and verified: a capability the product has, the early-access window, the onboarding service. NOT for unconfirmed features or invented milestones.
product_announcement.maps_to_strategy: marketing/01-strategy.md section 3 (key messages), section 5 (what we do not say); 03-launch-calendar.md.
required_inputs: announcement_subject: what is being announced
verification_check: confirmation the subject is a verified fact, not needs_confirmation or aspirational
language_mode: ru | uz | ru_then_uz
optional_inputs: supporting_screenshot_ref
linked_pain: the owner pain this capability removes
required_factual_evidence: The announced subject maps to a verified APPROVED_FACTS id (e.g. fact_offline, fact_payment_methods, fact_nasiya_debt, fact_owner_remote, fact_stage_early_access, fact_onboarding_service).
If the subject is needs_confirmation, the announcement must be reframed as a stated / early-access capability or held until owner confirmation; never announced as newly shipped.
product_announcement.language_output: RU primary, UZ mirror for launch-level announcements. Calm, factual, no hype.
structure: Lead: name the capability or milestone in one plain line.
What it does for the owner: 2-3 lines of concrete benefit in money/time terms.
Honest scope line: state the early-access stage where relevant (fact_stage_early_access); do not imply a live customer base.
CTA.
product_announcement.cta_rules: Usually 'Оставить заявку' (birliy.uz #lead); 'Написать в Telegram' for question-driven announcements. One CTA.
qa_rules: Inherit meta.global_qa_rules.
The subject is verified, or clearly framed as a stated early-access capability.
No deadline beyond 'early access 2026'.
failure_conditions: Inherit meta.global_failure_conditions.
Announcing a needs_confirmation feature as 'now available' / 'just launched'.
Implying existing live customers or quoting 'real shops already working'.
Any launch / delivery deadline beyond 'early access 2026'.

pain_to_solution_post.label: Pain to solution post (pillar 1)
pain_to_solution_post.use_when: The bread-and-butter format: name a pain the owner feels every day, show the cost, then show how BirLiy quietly removes it. Works on Instagram and Telegram.
pain_to_solution_post.maps_to_strategy: marketing/02-content-system.md template A; pillar 1 'Боль to облегчение'; ICP_AND_PAIN_MAP pains.
required_inputs: pain: a single recognizable pain from ICP_AND_PAIN_MAP (e.g. lost stock counts, paper debt notebook, three separate programs, no QR so a customer walks off)
relief_fact: the verified APPROVED_FACTS id that resolves this pain
language_mode: ru | uz | ru_then_uz
optional_inputs: segment: to sharpen the pain
screenshot_ref
required_factual_evidence: The relief maps to a verified fact id (e.g. notebook -> fact_nasiya_debt; lost stock -> fact_stock_auto_low_alert; three programs -> fact_single_surface_demo / fact_positioning; no QR -> fact_qr_no_terminal qualified on settlement timing; internet drops -> fact_offline).
Do not quantify the pain with an invented number or percentage; describe it qualitatively.
pain_to_solution_post.language_output: RU primary, UZ native mirror on request. Use the owner's own words for the pain.
structure: Pain in 1-2 lines, recognizable and specific.
Why it costs time or money, described qualitatively (no invented figures).
BirLiy relief in one sentence, tied to a fact id.
CTA.
qa_rules: Inherit meta.global_qa_rules.
Pain stated without exaggeration or fake urgency.
Relief is a real verified capability, not a wish.
failure_conditions: Inherit meta.global_failure_conditions.
Quantifying the pain or the relief with an invented number or percentage.
Promising a needs_confirmation outcome (instant settlement, one-day onboarding) as a guarantee.

owner_story.label: Owner story (illustrative day-in-the-life, NOT a testimonial)
owner_story.use_when: A narrative 'day of a shop owner' that dramatizes a pain and the relief. It is an ILLUSTRATION written in a generic or clearly hypothetical voice. It is NOT a customer testimonial and must never claim a named or real customer.
owner_story.maps_to_strategy: marketing/01-strategy.md tone (calm neighbour); pillar 3 'Свобода собственника'; pillar 1.
required_inputs: owner_situation: a realistic, generic shop scenario (no real person, no real shop name)
pains_and_reliefs: 1-3 pains each tied to a verified relief fact id
language_mode: ru | uz | ru_then_uz
optional_inputs: segment
time_of_day_frame: morning open, midday rush, evening close (the 'numbers reconcile in the evening' angle from fact_positioning)
required_factual_evidence: Every capability the story shows in action maps to a verified fact id (fact_offline, fact_owner_remote, fact_nasiya_debt, fact_payment_methods, fact_reporting, fact_single_surface_demo).
Any figure shown on a screen in the story is treated as the prohibited demo set and must NOT be quoted as a real result.
needs_confirmation capabilities are shown as 'helps with', not as a guaranteed outcome.
owner_story.language_output: RU primary, UZ native mirror. Warm, plain, first or third person generic owner; no named individual.
structure: Set the scene: a generic owner and a familiar moment in the shop.
The friction: the pain shows up (no invented numbers).
The shift: BirLiy quietly handles it, capability by capability, each tied to a fact id.
Calm close: the evening reconciles itself (fact_positioning).
CTA.
qa_rules: Inherit meta.global_qa_rules.
The owner is explicitly generic / illustrative; no claim it is a real customer.
No on-screen demo figure is cited as a real metric.
failure_conditions: Inherit meta.global_failure_conditions.
Presenting the story as a real, named, or verifiable customer (that would be an invented testimonial).
Quoting demo dashboard numbers or the sample receipt as the owner's real results.
Implying the owner is one of an existing live customer base ('real shops already working').

objection_handling_post.label: Objection handling post / FAQ answer
objection_handling_post.use_when: Answer a real prospect objection or fear honestly: 'it's complicated to set up', 'I have no computer', 'what if the internet drops', 'what if a cashier cheats', 'is it expensive', 'do I need a terminal'. Builds trust by being straight, including saying 'we will check' for unconfirmed specifics.
objection_handling_post.maps_to_strategy: marketing/01-strategy.md section 4 (trust triggers); COMPANY_CONTEXT truthful-answering policy; landing FAQ.
required_inputs: objection: the fear or question, in the prospect's words
truthful_answer_facts: the APPROVED_FACTS ids that honestly address it
language_mode: ru | uz | ru_then_uz
optional_inputs: follow_up_offer: route specifics to @birliy_support_bot
required_factual_evidence: The answer rests on verified facts (no computer -> fact_equipment_phone_only; internet -> fact_offline; cashier control -> fact_roles_security; no terminal -> fact_qr_no_terminal; price -> fact_pricing_promo).

If the honest answer touches a needs_confirmation item (one-day onboarding, 30-min learning, instant QR settlement, 9 000+ SKU, both app stores, unlimited cashiers), qualify it and offer to confirm specifics via @birliy_support_bot rather than guaranteeing.
If the truthful answer is not provable from any fact, say BirLiy will check and route to support; never invent the answer.
objection_handling_post.language_output: RU or UZ in the prospect's language, plain and reassuring, no defensiveness.
structure: Restate the objection plainly so the reader feels heard.
Honest answer grounded in verified facts.
Qualify any unconfirmed specifics; offer to confirm via support.
CTA.
objection_handling_post.cta_rules: Default 'Написать в Telegram' (+998 97 421 24 54); reference @birliy_support_bot for detailed questions. One CTA.
qa_rules: Inherit meta.global_qa_rules.
Honesty over salesmanship; no overstated security or settlement guarantees.
'Данные защищены' is bounded to PIN, roles, and action log, not a broad security guarantee.
failure_conditions: Inherit meta.global_failure_conditions.
Inventing an answer to make the objection disappear.
Turning a needs_confirmation point into a hard guarantee to win the argument.

case_study_without_invented_data.label: Case study WITHOUT invented data (capability-led, no fabricated results)
case_study_without_invented_data.use_when: A structured 'how BirLiy would solve this for a shop like yours' piece. Because BirLiy is in early access with no owner-confirmed customer results, this template FORBIDS any real-customer claim, any results number, and any testimonial. It is a capability-and-workflow case, not a metrics case.
case_study_without_invented_data.maps_to_strategy: COMPANY_CONTEXT 'what the CMO must never claim'; marketing/01-strategy.md section 5; UNVERIFIED_CLAIMS_REPORT groups H and I.
required_inputs: scenario_segment: a generic shop type from ICP_AND_PAIN_MAP
before_state: the manual pains (notebook, scattered tools), described qualitatively
after_workflow: the BirLiy workflow, each step tied to a verified fact id
language_mode: ru | uz | ru_then_uz
optional_inputs: screenshot_ref: real product screenshots from .research/product-walk/ (these are real UI, not result mockups)
required_factual_evidence: Every 'after' step maps to a verified APPROVED_FACTS id; needs_confirmation steps are framed as stated capabilities.
ZERO results metrics: no revenue, profit, time-saving, sales-count, or percentage figures of any kind, real or estimated.
No named customer, no quote attributed to a real owner, no 'X shops use BirLiy'.
case_study_without_invented_data.language_output: RU primary, UZ native mirror. Frame explicitly as 'a shop like yours' / 'magazin u dome kabi do'kon uchun', clearly hypothetical.
structure: Context: a generic shop and its manual 'before' (qualitative, no numbers).
Walkthrough: the BirLiy workflow step by step, each tied to a verified fact id.
What changes for the owner: described in plain terms (clarity, fewer parts, the evening reconciles per fact_positioning), with NO results figures.
Honest scope: early access stage (fact_stage_early_access).
CTA.
case_study_without_invented_data.cta_rules: 'Оставить заявку' (birliy.uz #lead) to invite a real pilot conversation, or 'Написать в Telegram'. One CTA.
qa_rules: Inherit meta.global_qa_rules.
Confirm absolutely no results number, percentage, or money figure appears as an outcome.
Confirm the case is clearly framed as illustrative / hypothetical, not a real customer story.
failure_conditions: Inherit meta.global_failure_conditions.
ANY invented or estimated result (money saved, time saved, revenue, percentage, sales count).
Any named or implied real customer, any testimonial quote.
Quoting demo dashboard numbers or the sample receipt as a real outcome.
Implying an existing live customer base or 'real shops already working'.

weekly_campaign.label: Weekly campaign (3-post rhythm across Instagram and Telegram)
weekly_campaign.use_when: Plan a coherent week of content that rotates the 7 pillars on the realistic 3-times-a-week rhythm (Mon / Wed / Fri), so the owner audience sees variety without overload.
required_inputs: week_theme: a loose connecting thread (optional but recommended)
three_pillars: pillar choices for Mon (1/2/6), Wed (3/4/5), Fri (7 offer)
language_plan: which posts ship bilingual (offer and launch always do)
optional_inputs: focus_segment: a segment to feature this week
available_screenshots: real screenshots to allocate to posts
required_factual_evidence: Each post inherits the required_factual_evidence of its own template (telegram_post, pain_to_solution_post, product_announcement, objection_handling_post, etc.).
The Friday offer post uses fact_pricing_promo / fact_pricing_start_chip + fact_promo_six_month, framed as the first-cohort rate.
No post repeats a prohibited demo number or implies a customer base.
weekly_campaign.language_output: RU primary across the week; UZ native mirrors for the offer post and any launch post.
structure: Monday: pain-to-relief, how-it-works, or by-segment (Instagram + extended Telegram).
Wednesday: owner-freedom, one-feature-big, or trust (Telegram feature/value post).
Friday: offer / early-access post with 'Оставить заявку'.
Each slot specifies pillar, template, fact ids, language, CTA, and an optional screenshot.
weekly_campaign.cta_rules: Per-post one CTA; Telegram posts default to 'Написать в Telegram', the Friday offer to 'Оставить заявку'.
qa_rules: Inherit meta.global_qa_rules per post.
No single pillar repeats twice in one week; one idea per post.
The week stays calm and consistent; no escalating scarcity across days.
failure_conditions: Inherit meta.global_failure_conditions per post.
Stacking multiple ideas into one post to fill the calendar.
Manufactured urgency building across the week ('last chance', countdowns).

competitor_comparison_without_defamation.label: Competitor comparison WITHOUT defamation (notebook / Excel / 1C only)
competitor_comparison_without_defamation.use_when: Position BirLiy against the real alternatives an Uzbek small-shop owner actually uses today: a paper notebook, Excel, or 1C. The comparison is FACTUAL and respectful; it never names or disparages another POS vendor and never makes a false claim about any competitor.
competitor_comparison_without_defamation.maps_to_strategy: fact_competitive_vs_notebook_1c; marketing/01-strategy.md section 3; COMPANY_CONTEXT value proposition.
required_inputs: comparison_target: one of the allowed targets
dimension: an honest dimension (ease of use, cost for a small shop, where data lives, learning curve, what gets lost)
language_mode: ru | uz | ru_then_uz
optional_inputs: segment_context
required_factual_evidence: The comparison rests on fact_competitive_vs_notebook_1c: works on a phone, understandable without training, combines register/stock/debts/reports in one place; 1C is complex and expensive for a small shop; a notebook or Excel loses debts and balances.
Any BirLiy advantage claimed maps to a verified capability fact id (fact_positioning, fact_single_surface_demo, fact_offline, fact_nasiya_debt, fact_stock_auto_low_alert).
No factual claim is made about a competitor's price, feature, or behavior beyond what fact_competitive_vs_notebook_1c states.
competitor_comparison_without_defamation.language_output: RU primary, UZ native mirror. Respectful, factual tone; the notebook and 1C are described as familiar tools, not as 'bad'.
structure: Name the familiar alternative the owner uses today, with respect.
State its honest limitation for a small shop, per fact_competitive_vs_notebook_1c (debts/balances get lost; 1C is complex and costly).
Show how BirLiy handles the same job, tied to verified fact ids.
CTA.
competitor_comparison_without_defamation.cta_rules: 'Написать в Telegram' or 'Оставить заявку'. One CTA.
qa_rules: Inherit meta.global_qa_rules.
Only notebook / Excel / 1C are compared against; no named POS vendor.
Every competitor statement is factual and within fact_competitive_vs_notebook_1c; tone stays respectful.
failure_conditions: Inherit meta.global_failure_conditions.
Naming or attacking a specific competing POS product or company.
Any false, exaggerated, or unverifiable claim about a competitor (defamation).
Mocking the owner's current notebook/Excel/1C rather than respecting it.

seo_content_brief.label: SEO content brief (input spec for an seo_blog_article)
seo_content_brief.use_when: Before writing an article, produce a brief that locks the keyword, intent, structure, fact ids, and CTA so the writer cannot drift off-fact. Hands off cleanly to the seo_blog_article template.
required_inputs: primary_keyword: RU and UZ
search_intent
target_icp_pain: from ICP_AND_PAIN_MAP
language: ru | uz | both
optional_inputs: secondary_keywords
competing_serp_notes: what existing pages cover (observed, not invented)
target_word_count_range
required_factual_evidence: The brief lists the exact APPROVED_FACTS ids the article may use, marking each verified or needs_confirmation (with its required framing).
It flags any prohibited fact that must NOT appear (demo numbers, sample receipt, 'real shops already working').
It specifies that competitor mentions are limited to notebook / Excel / 1C per fact_competitive_vs_notebook_1c.
seo_content_brief.language_output: Brief written for the writer; output language(s) of the article stated explicitly. Currency сум / so'm.
structure: Title options (2-3) using the primary keyword as the reader phrases it.
Meta description draft (no em-dash, with the keyword).
H2/H3 outline mapped to search intent, each heading tagged with the fact ids that back it.
FAQ questions (2-4) for AEO.
Allowed-facts list (ids + status + framing) and a do-not-use list (prohibited facts).
Internal links and the single CTA to use.
seo_content_brief.cta_rules: Specify exactly one approved CTA for the article and its destination.
qa_rules: Inherit meta.global_qa_rules.
Every outline section is backed by at least one fact id or flagged as general education with no product claim.
Do-not-use list explicitly names the prohibited facts.
failure_conditions: Inherit meta.global_failure_conditions.
A brief that allows a needs_confirmation fact without specifying its qualified framing.
A brief that does not name a single CTA, or permits a competitor comparison beyond notebook/Excel/1C.
Inventing SERP / competitor data instead of marking it as observed or unknown.
